# anthropic_agents (Data Source)

List all Managed Agents.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anthropic_agents" "all" {}

output "agents" {
  value = data.anthropic_agents.all.agents
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `agents` (Attributes List) List of agents. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--agents))

<a id="nestedatt--agents"></a>
### Nested Schema for `agents`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) ID of the Agent.
- `model` (String) Model ID of the Agent.
- `name` (String) Name of the Agent.
- `version` (String) Version of the Agent.
